scripts.dev: env -u PORT portless secrets pnpm --filter web dev
scripts.dev:server: env -u PORT portless api.secrets pnpm --filter server dev
scripts.cli:dev:build: pnpm -C packages/sdk build && pnpm -C packages/cli build
scripts.yalc:publish:sdk: pnpm -C packages/sdk build && pnpm -C packages/sdk exec yalc publish --private
scripts.yalc:publish:cli: pnpm -C packages/cli build && pnpm -C packages/cli exec yalc publish --private
scripts.yalc:push:sdk: pnpm -C packages/sdk build && pnpm -C packages/sdk exec yalc push --private
scripts.yalc:push:cli: pnpm -C packages/cli build && pnpm -C packages/cli exec yalc push --private
